SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.27               2026/04/20
=================================================
- Updated:
  - ISP to v2.0.0
  - Updated camera drivers
  - Fixed Maneki driver name (VDX941 to VD1943)

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.26               2026/03/27
=================================================
- Updated:
  - ST EdgeAI to v4.0
  - Vision Model PP to v0.14.2
  - AI PP Wrapper to v1.0.10
  - Fixed signature inconsistency on telnet stream

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.25               2026/03/26
=================================================
- Updated:
  - HAL to v1.3.0
  - Updated SLIB32 definitions
- Known bug:
  - Compilation issues with toolchain +v14.3.rel1

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.24               2025/12/11
=================================================
- Featuring:
  - Support for ST cameras (VDx941)
  - Telnet for shell access
- Updated:
  - EdgeAI to v2.2.0
  - Updated BSP/SLIB32 definitions
  - Included IO definitions for STM32N6-DK
  - Improved button debounce logic

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.23               2025/10/28
=================================================
- Featuring:
  - Support for VL53L7 TOF sensor
- Updated:
  - HAL to v1.2.0
  - ISP to v1.2.0
  - Fixed TCP stream application
  - Updated clock settings
  - Updated BSP/SLIB32 definitions
  - Updated project startup/system files
  - Updated memory layout (check linker)
- Known bug:
  - VD66GY color artifact on flip (h/v)

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.22               2025/06/26
=================================================
- Featuring:
  - SAI libraries for detection transform and drawing
- Updated:
  - Fixed NPU/MCU cache initialization
  - Refactored BSP core to simplify the GPIO definitions and usage
  - Updated BSP IO definitions
- Known bug:
  - VD66GY color artifact on flip (h/v)

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.21               2025/06/05
=================================================
- Updated:
  - Single file binary release

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.20               2025/06/04
=================================================
- Updated:
  - Device name on display to: "Edge AI Sensing Kit, E2IP Technologies"

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.19               2025/06/03
=================================================
- Featuring:
  - Integrated watchdog
- Updated:
  - Fixed SDCard hot-swap
  - Fixed artifact on snapshot: JPEG tearing
  - Refactored tasks initialization and organization

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.18               2025/05/27
=================================================
- Featuring:
  - Documentation for flashing/testing N6Cam
  - Support for ST cameras (VD55G1, VD66GY)
  - Command shell:
    - Camera flip configuration (h / v / off)
    - Wifi mode selection command (sta / off)
- Updated:
  - Fixed NPU cache management functions
  - Included extra logic for Wifi:
    - Added toggle in common.h to enable/disable service
    - Improved reconnection (empty IP and connection polling)
    - Updated init to check Wifi presence even when mode is OFF
  - Refactored draw implementation:
    - Functions enabled for using in multiple tasks
    - Print now allows to set the background width
    - Added color/alpha definitions
  - Refactored traces to improve readability
  - Refactored camera task for on-boot camera selection (IMX335, VD55G1, VD66GY)
  - User button (short press): Change AWB profile for ISP cameras (IMX335, VD66GY) and brightness for other devices (VD55G1)
- Known bug:
  - VD66GY color artifact on flip (h/v)

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.17               2025/04/09
=================================================
- Updated:
  - Removed POC support
  - Reorganized project structure
  - Changed Standalone to Application
  - Refactored release scripts

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.16               2025/04/08
=================================================
- Featuring:
  - User button:
    - Short press: Change AWB profile
    - Long press (+1sec): Take a snapshot
- Updated:
  - HAL to v1.1.0
  - ISP to v1.1.0
  - SRAM/FLASH layout
  - Refactored camera task and control commands

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.15               2025/04/01
=================================================
- Featuring:
  - RTC support
  - Command shell:
    - System commands (rtc)
    - Wifi control commands (mdns, sntp, static)
  - Wifi support (static IPs, mDNS client, SNTP client)
- Updated:
  - Refactored SLIB32 registry

SIANA-N6Cam_Murata v0.14               2025/03/18
=================================================
- Based on SIANA-N6Cam_BSP v1.0
- Featuring:
  - Registry
  - Command shell:
    - System commands (fw version, mcu uid, reboot)
    - Camera control commands (aec, awb, gain, exposure)
    - Wifi control commands (join, ifconfig)
  - Wifi support (RTSP server)
- Updated:
  - ISP updated to v1.0.1
  - People Detection model is now using ST Yolo V8n 192x192
  - Refactored/improved tests, BSP, and SLIB32

SIANA-N6Cam_BSP v1.0                   2025/01/14
=================================================
- Initial release
- Featuring:
  - Factory/Built-in tests
  - People detection
  - Camera snapshot
  - UVC streaming
- Using:
  - HAL v1.0.0
  - ISP v1.0.0
  - EdgeAI v2.0.0
  - lib_vision_models_pp v0.7.2
